liveLocation.pausedAccessibility: Live location paused. Tap for instructions to resume.
liveLocation.pausedAccessibilityHint: Opens fix instructions or device settings.
liveLocation.reasonStale: No location update in a while — tap to fix
liveLocation.reasonLowPower: Low Power Mode is throttling updates
liveLocation.reasonExpoGo: Background tracking needs the installed app
liveLocation.lowPowerBody: Your phone is in Low Power Mode, which can pause background location updates. Disable Low Power Mode in Settings to keep dispatch updated.
liveLocation.expoGoBody: Background location only works in the installed VNDRLY app. Switch off Expo Go and reopen the installed build to keep dispatch updated.
liveLocation.consentBody: Re-enable location sharing from your profile to resume sending pings to dispatch.
liveLocation.openSettingsFailedBody: Open Settings manually and grant 'Always' location permission to VNDRLY.

auth.switchOrgHelp: You belong to multiple organizations. Tap one to switch which one you're acting as.

login.title: Field Employee Portal
login.fieldEmployeesNote: Contact your office staff or admin to create your account under your Vendor.
login.biometricEnableBody: Use {{label}} to sign in faster next time.

contextPicker.title: Choose your organization
contextPicker.body: You belong to multiple organizations. Pick one to start with — you can switch any time from your profile.

directAssignment.passFailedToast: Could not pass on work assignment.

tickets.title: Tracking
tickets.mileageHelp: Enter the odometer reading. Leave blank and tap Skip if unavailable.
tickets.mileageRequired: Enter a value or tap Skip.
tickets.mileageInvalid: Mileage must be a non-negative number.
tickets.closeForReviewBody: This sends the ticket to your office contact, who will review it and submit it to the partner for payment.
tickets.closeTicketTitle: Close ticket and freeze labor totals?
tickets.closeTicketBody: This locks the running labor totals for every crew member on this ticket. Late check-outs won't change the numbers — your office can still edit the lines by hand.
tickets.errorCloseTicket: Could not close the ticket. Try again.
tickets.hintCheckIn: Tap Check In to start tracking time on this ticket.
tickets.hintCheckedIn: You're checked in. Tap Check Out when you leave.
tickets.hintCanClose: Send to your office to review and submit for payment.

newJob.workTypesHelp: Pick one or more — each gets its own tracking number.
newJob.onSiteHelp: We'll auto-check you in if your GPS confirms you're on site.
newJob.notYetHelp: Ticket starts as Pending Arrival. Tap En Route on the ticket when you head out.
newJob.noSites: No approved sites for your vendor yet.
newJob.siteUnavailableRefreshed: That site is no longer available. We refreshed your list — please pick a different one.
newJob.workTypeUnavailableRefreshed: Your company is no longer assigned to that service at this site. We refreshed the list — pick another, or ask your vendor admin to update site assignments.
newJob.workTypeContactAdmin: If you expected this service, contact your vendor admin to add it to your company's catalog or site assignment.
newJob.missingInfoBody: Pick a site and at least one work type.
newJob.workTypesLoading: Work types are still loading for this site. Wait a moment and try again.
newJob.foremanHelp: Suggested: you. Tap a teammate to assign someone else.
newJob.pickVendor: Pick a vendor before starting a ticket.

tickets.errorLoadOpen: Couldn't load your open tickets. Pull to refresh.
tickets.errorLoadHistory: Couldn't load your job history. Pull to refresh.
tickets.refreshDetailAccessibilityHint: Pulls the latest details, items, notes, and tracking from the server.
tickets.refreshHistoryAccessibilityHint: Pulls open jobs and recently closed jobs from the server.
tickets.inviteAwaitingBody: {{partner}} sent you this ticket. Accept to add it to your queue, or deny with a reason.
tickets.denyReasonPlaceholder: Why are you denying this ticket?
tickets.offGeofence: You are {{distance}} m away — must be within {{radius}} m of the site to check in.
tickets.awaitingPaymentBody: Let your office know this job is wrapped on site and the customer owes payment. You can add an optional note for context.
tickets.awaitingPaymentSentBody: Your office has been notified that this job is wrapped and the customer owes payment.
tickets.assignmentRemovedBodySite: Your office removed your vendor's assignment to this site, so this ticket can't be moved forward. Contact dispatch, or cancel this ticket.
tickets.assignmentRemovedBodyWorkType: Your office removed your vendor's approval for this work type at this site, so this ticket can't be moved forward. Contact dispatch, or cancel this ticket.
tickets.assignmentRemovedContactHint: Reach out to dispatch to find out what to do next.
tickets.assignmentRemovedConfirmBody: This ticket will be cancelled. Tracking will stop and the office will be notified.
tickets.assignmentRemovedCancelFailed: Couldn't cancel this ticket. Try again or contact dispatch.
tickets.assignmentRestoredToastForList: Assignment restored for {{ticket}} — you can open it again.
tickets.nudgeReceivedToastForList: {{ticket}} needs your attention — someone sent a workflow nudge.
tickets.deletePhotoBody: This photo will be removed from the ticket.
tickets.deleteNoteBody: This note will be removed from the ticket.
tickets.sentToOfficeBody: Your office has been notified and will review this ticket.
tickets.sentToOfficeBodyCrew: Crew was checked out and the ticket was sent to your office for review.
tickets.couldntCheckEveryoneOutOne: Couldn't check out {{name}} — please check them out manually before closing for review.
tickets.couldntCheckEveryoneOutTwo: Couldn't check out {{first}} and {{second}} — please check them out manually before closing for review.
tickets.couldntCheckEveryoneOutThree: Couldn't check out {{first}}, {{second}}, and {{third}} — please check them out manually before closing for review.
tickets.couldntCheckEveryoneOutMany: Couldn't check out {{first}}, {{second}}, and {{rest}} more — please check them out manually before closing for review.

ticketDetail.disperseFundsHelp: Record the payment that closes this ticket. The vendor will be notified once funds are dispersed.
ticketDetail.disperseFundsReferenceRequired: Reference is required for check payments.
ticketDetail.disperseFundsReceiptHelp: Attach a photo of the check stub, wire confirmation, or signed receipt.
ticketDetail.disperseFundsError: Couldn't disperse funds. Please try again.
ticketDetail.reverseDispersalHelp: Reversing returns this ticket to Approved and clears the payment fields. Both Accounts Payable and the vendor will be notified.
ticketDetail.reverseDispersalReasonPlaceholder: Why is this dispersal being reversed?
ticketDetail.reverseDispersalError: Couldn't reverse dispersal. Please try again.

nudge.title: Workflow nudge
nudge.subtitle: Send a reminder to the next party up or down the chain. Does not change ticket status.

flag.title: Flag ticket
flag.help: Flag this job for attention. Everyone on the ticket gets notified.

siteVisitSummary.title: Site visit summary
siteVisitSummary.subtitle: Route, time on site, and geofence checks for everyone who worked this ticket — for billing and dispute review.
siteVisitSummary.failed: Could not load site visit summary.
siteVisitSummary.noPeople: No check-ins recorded for this ticket yet.

visitor.signInSubtitle: Tell us who you are. Your session is valid for 24 hours.
visitor.safetyAck: I acknowledge I will follow all site safety rules.
visitor.noHosts: No host options available for this site.
visitor.geofenceNote: You must be at the site to check in. Location will be captured.
visitor.pickHost: Please select who you are visiting.
visitor.requireName: First and last name are required.
visitor.requireSafety: Please acknowledge the site safety rules.
visitor.locationDenied: Location permission is required to check in.
visitor.scanHint: Point your camera at the site QR code
visitor.invalidQr: Unrecognized QR code. Please try again or enter the site code manually.
visitor.cameraDenied: Camera permission is required to scan QR codes.
visitor.unknownSiteCode: We couldn't find that site — double-check the code or scan the QR.
visitor.siteLookupFailed: We couldn't look up that site right now. Check your connection and try again.
visitor.sessionExpiredBody: Visitor sign-ins are good for 24 hours. Sign in again to continue checking in.

errors.unknownError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.badRequest: The request couldn't be processed. Please check your input and try again.

errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to do that.
errors.notFound: We couldn't find what you were looking for.
errors.conflict: That action can't be completed right now.
errors.validationFailed: Some information is missing or invalid. Please check the form and try again.
errors.invalid_query: That search has invalid filters. Please review and try again.

audit_trail.export_forbidden: Audit-trail export is restricted to admin, partner, or vendor roles.

askv.title: AskV
askv.subtitle: Your VNDRLY guide — how-to, live lookups, and onboarding help.
askv.greetingField: Hi {{name}}! I can walk you through tickets, GPS, profile, and notifications on the field app. What can I help with?
askv.greetingForeman: Hi {{name}}! I can help with crew check-in, schedule, map, and ticket workflows. What do you need?
askv.greetingPartner: Hi {{name}}! Ask about sites, tickets, visitors, payables, and partner workflows.
askv.greetingVendor: Hi {{name}}! Ask about invoices, field employees, catalog, and vendor workflows.
askv.greetingAdmin: Hi {{name}}! Ask about platform setup, tickets, 1099, and admin workflows.
askv.clearBody: This deletes the chat history for this session.
askv.errorGeneric: The assistant is having trouble right now. Please try again.

foremanHome.pttMicDeniedBody: Allow microphone access to use push-to-talk.
foremanHome.pttNotReadyBody: Bring VNDRLY to the foreground, wait a moment, then hold the mic button again.

consent.title: Share your live location while on the clock?
consent.bodySuffix: for a job, VNDRLY can share your location with your vendor and VNDRLY admins so they can see where the crew is and route help to you if needed.
consent.bullet1: Sharing only happens while a ticket is active. It stops automatically when you check out.
consent.bullet2: Only your employing vendor and VNDRLY admins can see your location. Partners cannot.
consent.bullet3: Pings are kept for 30 days. You can revoke at any time from Profile → Location sharing.
consent.bullet4: Pings are sent every few minutes using a battery-friendly mode.
consent.permissionMessage: VNDRLY needs location permission to share your position with your vendor while on the clock. You can enable this later from Settings.
